articles.summary: Companies that are serious about experimentation know that it's more than A/B testing the color of your CTA buttons. It's a strategic growth lever that delivers greater insight and control over how you engage with customers.

articles.title: Get started now with just an email address
BOTTLENECKS, AI, AND WHERE PRODUCT ADDS VALUE
articles.summary: If AI speeds up software development, the new bottlenecks are backlog quality, user insight, and managing change. Product teams must focus less on speed and more on smart prioritization, anticipating needs, and guiding product evolution with strategic judgment.

articles.title: DISRUPTION AND DENIAL
articles.summary: Just as the Internet demanded a rethinking of product development decades ago, AI now requires teams to evolve how they build and deliver value. Those who resist change will fall behind as others seize the opportunity to redefine what's possible.

articles.title: WHY WE GET HOOKED: THE INVISIBLE THREADS BEHIND PRODUCT LOYALTY
articles.summary: Variable rewards, social proof, and identity formation keep users loyal to products. Designers are urged to craft ethical, value‑driven experiences rather than manipulative hooks.

articles.title: HOW OPENAI'S HEAD OF BUSINESS PRODUCTS USES CHATGPT TO SAVE TIME AT WORK (46 MINUTE VIDEO)
articles.summary: OpenAI builds products through fast, responsible iteration, fueled by internal AI use and a culture where ideas can come from anyone. To thrive in this AI era, employees must go beyond using tools - they should adopt AI as a thought partner to elevate their work and productivity.

articles.title: VERIFY (AND RE-VERIFY) USERS WITH CONFIDENCE — GET THE LOW-DOWN ON REUSABLE IDENTITIES
articles.summary: Everyone's talking about reusable identity, but few understand how it works or what it means for user onboarding. Persona recently hosted tech leaders from Ally Financial and KeyBank for a detailed discussion [9] about reusable identity — including how it impacts trust, compliance, and the balance between UX and risk. Watch the recording

articles.title: AI PROTOTYPING FOR PRODUCT MANAGERS: HOW TO TEST A HYPOTHESIS FAST
articles.summary: AI tools enable quick, low‑cost prototypes that validate ideas before engineering. This walkthrough covers prompt design, iterative loops, and stakeholder demos, emphasizing speed over pixel‑perfect fidelity.

articles.title: A DESIGNER'S GUIDE TO CURSOR (35 MINUTE VIDEO)
articles.summary: Learn how to use Cursor to explore design styles, build smarter prototypes, and refine dashboards with AI. Discover tips for tailoring AI to your taste, syncing with Notion, and speeding up workflows using Cursor Rules.

articles.title: UNLOCKING THE POWER OF INTRINSIC MOTIVATION
articles.summary: Companies motivate best through intrinsic drivers - when people find meaning and satisfaction in their work. Leaders can foster this by offering meaningful challenges, encouraging growth, recognizing effort, and building belonging.

articles.title: HOW (AND WHY) WE HELP
articles.summary: Consulting approaches differ between giving direct solutions (gap-focused) and encouraging teams to find their own answers through discussion (relationship-based). Managing this tension means choosing whether to follow your beliefs or fit organizational expectations thoughtfully.

articles.title: CARE REQUIRES CONFLICT
articles.summary: Real product excellence requires pushing beyond comfortable consensus, demanding difficult conversations, and rejecting mediocrity disguised as collaboration.

articles.title: INVISIBLE AI V.S. INCREMENTAL AI
articles.summary: SaaS products use either incremental AI as superficial add-ons or invisible AI seamlessly integrated to enhance user experiences.
